name: pact
description: Governed outcome recovery from verified signal to coordinated action and measured result.

interface.shortDescription: Turn verified business signals into governed outcomes.
interface.longDescription: PACT helps Codex investigate a consequential KPI, challenge the evidence, coordinate a dependency-aware response, invoke safe simulated business tools, and track the measured outcome.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use PACT to investigate this business signal, build a governed recovery plan, and track it to a measurable outcome.
